profile.description: Manage your personal information and security settings
profile.personalInfoNote: Personal information is managed by administrators. Please contact your administrator for modifications.
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and SSH keys
profile.authMethodNote: Authentication method is configured by administrators in User Management
profile.noKeyMessage: You don't have an SSH key yet. Generate one to use SSH client to login directly.
profile.keyConfiguredMessage: SSH key is configured. You can connect using the following command:
profile.confirmRegenerate: Regenerating will overwrite the existing key. Continue?
profile.confirmDownload:
Key generated successfully! Download private key now?

 Private key can only be downloaded once!
profile.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the SSH key? You will not be able to use key authentication after deletion.
profile.downloadSuccess: Private key downloaded successfully! Please keep it safe.
profile.tip1: Private key can only be downloaded once, please keep it safe
profile.tip2: Set file permissions after download: chmod 600 filename
profile.tip3: Never share your private key with anyone
profile.tip4: If you lose your private key, please regenerate it
profile.passwordNote: Change your password regularly to keep your account secure
profile.changePasswordNote: Password change requires administrator privileges, please contact your administrator
profile.changePasswordFeature: Password change feature is under development
profile.twoFactorNote: Add extra security protection to your account
profile.twoFactorRedirect: Please switch to the Security Settings tab to manage two-factor authentication
profile.publicKey: Public Key (for SSH client known_hosts configuration)
profile.confirmDownload: Key generated! Please download the private key immediately. It can only be downloaded once. Download now?
profile.privateKeyDownloaded: Private key downloaded successfully, please keep it safe
profile.confirmRegenerate: Generating a new key will overwrite the existing key. Please ensure you have backed up the old key. Continue?
profile.deleteWarning: After deleting the SSH key, you will not be able to log in using public key authentication. If the authentication method is set to "Public Key Only", it will automatically be changed to "Password Authentication".
profile.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete {{username}}'s SSH key?
profile.tip1: • The private key can only be downloaded once when generated, please keep it safe
profile.tip2: • If you lose the private key, you need to regenerate the key pair (old key will be invalidated)
profile.tip3: • Recommended to set private key file permissions to 600: chmod 600 private_key_file
profile.howToUse: How to use SSH key login:
profile.step1: 1. Download the private key file immediately after generation
profile.step2: 2. Save the private key file locally (e.g., ~/.ssh/zjump_key)
profile.step5: 5. Select authentication method as "Public Key" or "Password + Public Key"
profile.notConfiguredTip: SSH key not configured yet. Click the button below to generate a new SSH key pair.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.adminConfig: Admin Configuration - Configure system parameters, authentication methods, security policies, etc.
settings.displayOnTitle: Display on page title and login page
settings.autoReconnectDesc: Automatically try to reconnect when connection is lost

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication Settings
twoFactor.description: Two-factor authentication provides additional security protection for your account
twoFactor.globalWarning: When enabled, all users must set up 2FA to log in
twoFactor.setupInstructions: Please use an authenticator app to scan the QR code, then enter the verification code
twoFactor.backupCodesWarning: Please save these backup codes safely, they can only be shown once

settings.saveError: Failed to save, please try again
settings.saveSuccessRestart: Configuration saved successfully! Some settings may require service restart to take effect.
settings.logoHelper: Logo image path or URL displayed in navigation bar
settings.pathTip: Tip: You can use relative paths (e.g. /logo.png) or full URLs (e.g. https://example.com/logo.png)
settings.ldapDesc: Use enterprise LDAP for unified identity authentication
settings.ssoDesc: Support OIDC, OAuth2, CAS, SAML protocols
settings.ipWhitelistHelper: One IP or CIDR per line, supports single IP, IP range, CIDR format
settings.feishuSecretHelper: Required if signature verification is enabled
settings.dingtalkSecretHelper: Required if signature verification is enabled
settings.scrollbackHelper: Number of lines to keep in history
settings.uploadPathHelper: Server directory for storing uploaded files
settings.allowedExtensionsHelper: Separate with comma, leave empty for no restriction
settings.uploadTip: Tip: Regularly clean up expired uploaded files to avoid high disk usage
settings.saveNote: Configuration changes may require service restart to take effect
settings.testNotificationSuccess: Notification sent successfully! Please check the recipient.
settings.testNotificationFailed: Failed to send notification, please check configuration.
settings.callbackUrlHelper: This callback URL needs to be configured in SSO provider
settings.authMutexWarning: Note: Enabling SSO authentication will automatically disable LDAP authentication. Only one of the three authentication methods (password, LDAP, SSO) can be enabled at a time.
settings.authConfigDesc: Configure user login authentication method. The three methods are mutually exclusive, only one can be enabled at a time
settings.authWarning: After changing the authentication method, all users will need to log in again. Please proceed with caution!
settings.hostMonitorDesc: Configure host online status detection method and frequency
settings.enableHostMonitorHelper: When enabled, the system will periodically check the online status of all hosts
settings.monitorMethodHelper: TCP: Check host port; ICMP: Use Ping command; HTTP: Check HTTP service
settings.monitorIntervalHelper: How often to perform status check, recommended no less than 3 minutes
settings.monitorTimeoutHelper: Timeout for single detection, recommended 2-5 seconds
settings.monitorConcurrentHelper: Number of hosts to check simultaneously, recommended 10-50
settings.monitorMethodTCPHelper: TCP: Check host port connectivity (Recommended, most accurate)
settings.monitorMethodICMPHelper: ICMP: Use Ping command (Requires system permission)
settings.monitorMethodHTTPHelper: HTTP: Check HTTP service (Suitable for web servers)
settings.monitorConfigSummary: Current Configuration: Check all hosts every {{interval}} minute(s) using {{method}} (timeout {{timeout}}s, max {{concurrent}} concurrent checks)
settings.monitorDisabledMessage: Host status monitoring is disabled. When enabled, the system will periodically check the online status of all hosts.
settings.sessionTimeoutHelperText: Auto logout time after user inactivity
settings.passwordComplexityLabel: Enable password complexity requirements (uppercase, lowercase, numbers and special characters)
settings.ssoExampleScopes: • Scopes: (leave empty or enter required scopes)
settings.ssoExampleNote: Get Client ID and Secret from Feishu Open Platform after creating an application
settings.providerHelper: e.g.: Feishu, Google, Azure AD, Keycloak
settings.clientIdHelper: Feishu App ID, obtained from Open Platform credentials
settings.clientSecretHelper: Feishu App Secret, obtained from Open Platform credentials
settings.redirectUrlHelper: SSO callback URL, needs to be configured in service provider
settings.bindDnHelper: Administrator DN for binding to LDAP server
settings.userFilterHelper2: User search filter, {username} will be replaced with actual username

assetSync.title: Asset Sync Configuration
assetSync.subtitle: Automatically sync host asset information from Prometheus
assetSync.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this sync configuration?
assetSync.promqlHelper: Supports conditional PromQL queries, e.g.: up, up{job='node'}, node_exporter_build_info, etc.
assetSync.noConfigs: No sync configurations. Click "Add Sync Source" button to configure your first asset sync source.

tips.title: Supported Sync Sources:
tips.prometheus: Sync host information from Prometheus Targets API, automatically discover monitoring targets

approvalConfig.title: Ticket Platform Configuration
approvalConfig.subtitle: Configure third-party ticket approval platforms like Feishu, DingTalk, WeChat Work. System will automatically obtain access_token using app_id + app_secret
approvalConfig.deleteConfirm: Are you sure to delete this ticket configuration?
approvalConfig.appIdHelper: App ID or AppKey obtained from the open platform (used to automatically obtain access_token, no need to manually input token)
approvalConfig.appSecretHelper: App Secret obtained from the open platform (used to automatically obtain access_token)
approvalConfig.appSecretHelperEdit: Enter new Secret if you want to update, otherwise keep the original value
approvalConfig.appSecretPlaceholder: Keep original value if not changing
approvalConfig.approvalCodeHelper: Unique identifier for Feishu approval definition (check in Feishu approval admin, e.g.: approval_xxxx)
approvalConfig.processCodeHelper: Unique identifier for DingTalk approval process (check in DingTalk approval admin, e.g.: PROC-xxxx)
approvalConfig.templateIdHelper: Unique identifier for WeChat Work approval template (check in WeChat Work approval admin)
approvalConfig.formFieldsHelper: Important: The label must exactly match the field name configured in the approval platform! Available fields: title (Ticket Title), description (Description), reason (Reason), resources (Resources), duration (Duration)
approvalConfig.noConfigs: No ticket configurations. Click "Add Ticket Platform" button to configure your first ticket platform.
approvalConfig.invalidJsonFormat: Invalid JSON format for form fields

tips.title: Supported Ticket Platforms:
tips.feishu: Create an enterprise self-built app on Feishu Open Platform, obtain App ID and Secret, and configure ticket approval definition code
tips.dingtalk: Create an enterprise internal app on DingTalk Open Platform, obtain AppKey and AppSecret, and configure ticket approval process code
tips.wechat: Create a self-built app in WeChat Work admin console, obtain AgentId and Secret, and configure ticket approval template ID

userConfig.title: User Configuration
userConfig.defaultUserIdHelper: Default user ID for creating approvals

apiConfig.callbackUrlHelper: System callback interface path, used to receive approval status change notifications from third-party platforms

approverConfig.title: Approver Configuration
approverConfig.approverUserIdsHelper: Approver user ID list in JSON array format, e.g.: ["user1", "user2"]
